items.name: Sales Copilot (Opportunity Summaries)
items.description: Microsoft Copilot for Sales generating opportunity summaries, meeting prep, and next-best-action from playbook guidance.

items.name: Contoso Support Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio bot on the self-service portal that answers from knowledge articles, deflects cases (logging con_casedeflection), and creates a case with entitlement context when it cannot resolve.

items.name: Copilot for Field Service
items.description: Embedded Copilot that summarizes work order history, drafts booking recommendations, and answers technician questions in the mobile app.

items.name: Contoso Project Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio agent answering delivery managers' questions on project margin, burn rate, and open staffing requests via Dataverse grounding.

items.name: Copilot for Marketers (Content Ideas & Query Assist)
items.description: In-app Copilot generating email content ideas and building segments/journeys from natural-language prompts.

items.name: Copilot for Customer Insights
items.description: Natural-language segment builder and profile Q&A Copilot grounded on the unified customer data.

items.name: Contoso AP Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio agent that answers AP clerks' questions on invoice status, approval tier, and posting errors grounded in con_apapprovalrequest and mserp_vendinvoiceheader.

items.name: Contoso Procurement Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio agent letting buyers query requisition status, vendor on-time rates, and draft new requisitions in natural language.

items.name: Contoso Store Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio agent for store associates to look up product availability, customer loyalty status, and book clienteling appointments.

items.name: Contoso Onboarding Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio agent that answers new-hire policy/benefits questions and surfaces the worker's pending con_onboardingtask items in Teams.

items.name: Contoso Contact Center Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio bot handling first-line self-service on chat and voice before agent escalation.

items.name: Contoso CoE Governance Copilot
items.description: Copilot Studio agent answering CoE admins' natural-language questions about environments, orphaned flows and attestation status over Dataverse.

items.name: con_contosoLeadScoreApi
items.description: Custom API (con_CalculateLeadScore) invoked by the scoring flow to compute con_leadscore server-side.

items.name: con_conSuggestknowledgearticles
items.description: Custom API exposing agent-assist knowledge suggestions ranked by case subject and prior deflection success.

items.name: con_contosoSendTimeOptimizationApi
items.description: Custom API wrapping an Azure ML model that recommends optimal send times per contact for journey email steps.

items.name: con_fraudscorecustomapi
items.description: Custom API (con_ScoreTransactionFraud) that scores a transaction for fraud risk and writes con_fraudscore before statement posting.

items.name: con_skillExtractionCustomApi
items.description: Custom API (con_ExtractSkills) that calls Azure OpenAI to parse resume/job text and suggest con_skill matches for the talent marketplace.
AI Builder prediction model scoring likelihood of asset failure from inspection and service history to trigger proactive work orders.
AI Builder receipt-processing model that extracts amount, date, and merchant from uploaded receipts to prefill expense records.
OOB customer churn prediction model scoring unified profiles on a scheduled cadence.
AI Builder invoice-processing model extracting header/line data from PDF vendor invoices to prefill con_apapprovalrequest.
AI Builder document-processing model extracting invoice line data from vendor PDFs for three-way match against PO lines.
Native Omnichannel sentiment model scoring customer messages in real time and writing to the conversation's msdyn_sentimentpulse.
